note: Day 26 (Wednesday). Active notes: leads 50/52/55/56 ONLY — their breakups fire tomorrow (2026-04-24). All other leads' LinkedIn windows have either expired or are blocked by today's breakup emails. SIX consecutive BRAIN runs without linkedin_profiles.json from HANDS — all notes remain generic. Generic notes still worth sending at this pre-breakup stage; post_reference upgrades would significantly improve acceptance rates but require profile data not yet received.

strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine compliment — stands out from polished AI outreach slop
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity only
Do not use 'reach out' or 'touch base'
Do not mention 'digital marketing' or 'web design' explicitly
strategy.upgrade_path: If HANDS writes linkedin_profiles.json with last_post_text before sending: upgrade generic → post_reference using the upgrade_note for each lead. HANDS: check profile for recent posts BEFORE sending the note — if post found, use the upgrade pattern, trim to 200 chars, then send.

active_notes.note: Linda — Holderness Homecare came up when I was looking at independent care providers around Beverley. Something about the online presence caught my attention. Connecting in case it's relevant.
active_notes.status: READY_TO_SEND (if profile active within 60 days, if no IMAP reply found) — execute TODAY 2026-04-23. Breakup email fu_046 fires tomorrow at 09:00.
active_notes.condition: active_profile_60_days AND no IMAP reply. IMAP check mandatory before sending.
active_notes.upgrade_note: HANDS: before sending, check Linda's LinkedIn activity. If she has posted about care quality, CQC inspection results, staff recognition, team wellbeing, or community volunteering in the last 60 days: use this upgrade pattern instead — 'Linda — your post about [X] stood out. Holderness Homecare came up when I was looking at independent care providers around Beverley. Something about the online presence worth mentioning. Connecting in case it's relevant.' Trim to under 200 chars. Care sector posts tend to be genuine and specific — much better note upgrade material than trades.
active_notes.if_accepted_message: Linda — thanks for connecting. I noticed something about the Holderness Homecare online presence worth a quick mention. Happy to share if useful.
